name: First Choice Healthcare Solutions, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview First Choice Healthcare Solutions, Inc. (FCHS, the Company, we, our or us) is actively engaged in pivoting the Companys strategy away from our historic orthopedic business model to a strategy of developing a national chain of innovative medical functional health and wellness clinics focused on providing life improvement services (anti-aging, weight management, and hormone replacement) and pharmacy services, in key high growth markets throughout the U.S. Although we still...
